title: QA: Validate shared-infra agent setup against docs/agent_setup_spec.md
description:
## Summary
Run a QA validation of the shared baseline repository against the agent setup contract documented in docs/agent_setup_spec.md.

## Scope
- Validate runtime contract commands and environment behavior.
- Validate minimal file contract artifacts are present.
- Validate shared docs and skill directories expected by the spec.
- Validate verification command contract in the spec versus actual Make targets.

## Findings to capture
- PASS/NITS/FAIL status with concrete command/file evidence.
- Any contract drift between docs and implementation.
- Recommended remediation tasks for drift.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Child task is linked under epic shared-infra-ad1.
- Validation evidence is recorded in issue notes.
- Contract drift (if any) is explicitly documented with severity.
- Follow-up action is defined for any FAIL/NITS items.
notes:
QA Validation Report: shared-infra baseline vs docs/agent_setup_spec.md
Timestamp: 2026-04-27T01:03Z

Overall verdict: NITS (repo is largely configured correctly; one spec/implementation drift found)

Evidence

1) Runtime detection/init contract — PASS
- Command: make -f Makefile.shared agent-runtime-resolve
- Result: resolved container-beads, runtime check passed.
- Additional environment evidence from make -f Makefile.shared agent-repro:
  - node=v22.16.0
  - npm=10.9.2
  - make=GNU Make 4.3
  - git=2.49.0
  - bd CLI available

2) Minimal file contract presence — PASS
Validated present:
- AGENTS.md
- Makefile.shared
- .agent/profiles/container-beads.md
- .agent/profiles/local-lite.md
- .devcontainer/devcontainer.json
- .devcontainer/postCreate.sh
- .agents/skills/ (directory)
- .github/skills/ (directory)

3) Shared docs expected by spec — PASS
- docs/agent_setup_spec.md (source contract)
- docs/skills_and_components_classification.md
- docs/beads_troubleshooting.md

4) Validation command contract in spec — NITS (doc drift)
Spec currently states:
- make -f Makefile.shared verify-layout
- make -f Makefile.shared verify-skill
- make -f Makefile.shared verify-templates

Actual state:
- These targets do not exist in Makefile.shared (make fails: "No rule to make target 'verify-layout'").

Severity
- NITS (documentation drift, not a runtime blocker for current repo operation)

Recommendation
- Align docs/agent_setup_spec.md Validation Contract section with implemented targets (e.g., agent-runtime-resolve, agent-repro, agent-qa-check, plus concrete file contract checks), OR
- Add verify-layout/verify-skill/verify-templates targets to Makefile.shared and keep current doc wording.

Next action
- Create follow-up task to reconcile spec validation section with actual Make targets, then close after doc/Make parity is restored.

title: Set up the Beads UI
description:
## Summary
Set up and validate the Beads UI experience for this repository so issues can be inspected and managed visually.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Beads UI can be launched from this repo
- Core view (issue list/details) renders successfully
- Basic usage steps are documented in issue notes/comments

title: General Continuous Improvement
description:
## Summary
Establish an ongoing epic to track broad, incremental improvements across shared infrastructure, developer workflow, and automation quality.

## Outcomes
- Maintain a durable container for continuous improvement tasks
- Keep improvements discoverable and prioritized
- Enable child tasks to be linked and tracked under a single strategic umbrella
